intentAndPurpose.intent: Binary selection control for forms and settings with tri-state (indeterminate) support.

forbids: use as a toggle for non-boolean values

rules.name: readOnly
useWhen: display-only state, value visible but not editable

props.name: accent
props.description: accent property

props.name: appearance
props.description: Appearance role — border, hover, and checked fill. `auto` → secondary stack.

props.name: aria-describedby
props.description: For composite fields — links to `Field.Description` etc.

props.name: aria-invalid
props.description: Invalid state for form validation (exposed on the checkbox control).

props.name: aria-label
props.description: For `labelWrapper="div"` — required accessible name when there is no inner label text

props.name: checked
props.description: Whether the checkbox is checked (controlled)

props.name: className
props.description: Additional class name

props.name: data-testid
props.description: Test automation id — forwarded to the checkbox control (`BaseCheckbox.Root`).

props.name: defaultChecked
props.description: Default checked state (uncontrolled)

props.name: description
props.description: Supplementary copy below the label row when using the integrated stack (mirrors `Input.description`).

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the checkbox is disabled

props.name: errorHighlight
props.description: Invalid chrome on the wrapper (mirrors `Input.errorHighlight`).

props.name: id
props.description: HTML id attribute

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Whether the checkbox is in indeterminate state

props.name: label
props.description: Visible label beside the control (string).

props.name: labelAssociation
props.description: How string label / description associate with the control (mirrors `Input`). - `native`: outer `

props.name: labelSuffixInside
props.description: Rendered after label text inside the label element (e.g. required asterisk).

props.name: labelTrailing
props.description: Rendered after the label element on the same row (e.g. info control).

props.name: labelWrapper
props.description: Outer wrapper element. Use `'div'` inside `CheckboxField` (with `Field.Label`) so the visible label is not nested inside a second `<label>`.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name for form submission

props.name: onCheckedChange
props.description: Change handler

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Whether the checkbox is read-only (visually distinct from disabled)

props.name: required
props.description: HTML required — form validation when unchecked

props.name: size
props.description: Size preset. Default: 'm'

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles

props.name: supplementaryDescribedById
props.description: When `labelAssociation="field"`, merged onto the control `aria-describedby` for auxiliary copy outside `Field.Description` (e.g. `CheckboxField` helper row).

props.name: value
props.description: Value used when inside a CheckboxGroup
